home.title: Transaction Rule Conditions
home.createLabel: Create a new Transaction Rule Condition
home.createOrEditLabel: Create or edit a Transaction Rule Condition

transactionRuleCondition.created: A new Transaction Rule Condition is created with identifier {{ param }}
transactionRuleCondition.updated: A Transaction Rule Condition is updated with identifier {{ param }}
transactionRuleCondition.deleted: A Transaction Rule Condition is deleted with identifier {{ param }}

delete.title: Delete rule condition?
delete.message: This will delete this rule condition. The rule itself will not be deleted. If this was the last condition, the rule will be disabled to prevent it from matching every transaction. This action cannot be undone.

help.TRANSACTION_DATE: Use comma-separated dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
help.POSTING_DATE: Use comma-separated dates in YYYY-MM-DD format.
